meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Speed Up Freelance Dev Workflows
content.seo_description: Overcome slow development speed with the Antigravity project template. A high-impact guide for freelancers using Claude Code to ship faster and impress clients.
content.answer_block: Stop building from scratch. The Antigravity project template provides a pre-architected, production-ready foundation that eliminates boilerplate. By combining this modular framework with Claude Code’s autonomous execution, freelancers can slash development time by 70%, ensuring you deliver complex, high-quality SaaS applications to your clients in record time.
content.intro:
Every freelancer knows the crushing weight of the 'blank canvas' phase. You spend hours configuring routing, authentication, and database schemas before writing a single line of business logic. This isn't just slow; it’s a direct hit to your profit margins and client satisfaction.

We’ve engineered the Antigravity template to flip the script. It acts as an architectural scaffolding that handles the heavy lifting, allowing you to bypass the mundane and jump straight into feature development. When you pair this with the raw power of Claude Code, you stop being a laborer and start being an architect of high-velocity systems.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Clone the core template to establish a standardized directory structure and pre-configured environment variables.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity production-ready boilerplate with Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Define Schema with AI Context
steps.description: Use your database schema as the source of truth to ensure the AI generates type-safe code that matches your client's requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the provided schema.prisma file and generate the corresponding CRUD API routes and type definitions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate CRUD endpoints based on schema.prisma'

steps.title: Implement Modular UI Components
steps.description: Leverage Antigravity’s atomic design system to build out the dashboard interface without writing custom CSS.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive user dashboard component using Antigravity UI primitives, including a sidebar, top-nav, and data table view.

steps.title: Automate Authentication Flow
steps.description: Secure the application using pre-built auth hooks provided by the template to avoid common security pitfalls.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate the Antigravity Auth Guard into the main layout to protect private routes and handle user session persistence.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Implement AuthGuard middleware for all /dashboard routes'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Run the automated test suite to ensure the build is production-ready before handing it off to the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the Antigravity diagnostic suite to check for build errors, linting issues, and potential security vulnerabilities.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --cmd 'npm run build && npm test'

pro_tips: Always use a .env.local file injected by Claude Code to prevent credential leakage during the development cycle.
Map your database schema to your Antigravity prompt; the more context the AI has, the fewer hallucinations you face.
Use 'claude config' to set custom system instructions that enforce your specific coding style across all files.
Modularize your UI components early; if it's reused twice, it belongs in the 'components/shared' folder of the template.
Force-run the linter via Claude Code after every major prompt to keep the codebase clean and maintainable for your clients.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, audit the code for performance bottlenecks and package your custom logic into a private npm library to speed up your next client project even further.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the boilerplate and start building the future. Our community of elite freelancers is already shipping 3x faster with these workflows. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
